name: Peach or Apricot Butter- Crock-Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain fruit and de-pit.
2. Puree using blender or food processor.
3. Pour into the crock-pot.
4. Add remaining ingredients.
5. Cover; cook on High for 8 to 10 hours.
6. Remove cover during last half of cooking time.
7. Stir occasionally.
8. Store in refrigerator.
Variation: Fresh Peach or Apricot Butter - Wash, peel, and pit the fruit. Cook until soft. Add sugar (2/3 to 3/4 cup per cup of fruit), then spices, and cook as directed in recipes.
